name: Friendship Fiesta Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Don't spill the beans about the surprise ingredient.
2. Measure 2 cups of cooked and mashed beans.
3. Cream butter, sugar, and egg. Add the rest of the ingredients except for apples, nuts, and raisins. Mix well then fold in apples, nuts, and raisins. Pour into a well-greased 10-inch tube pan or bundt pan.
4. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 45 minutes or until done. Cool in the pan for 5 minutes before removing.
5. Glaze and decorate with maraschino cherry halves and chopped nuts.
Glaze: 1 cup powdered sugar, 1/4 tsp vanilla, 1 T butter, melted, 1 1/2 tsp milk. Blend all ingredients together and beat until smooth.
